posts.author: ClayAndSprout
posts.text: Finally got my hands on some kiln-safe glazes today! The deep cobalt blue looks absolutely stunning on this small bowl. Can't wait to fire it up and see if the crackle pattern develops as hoped. #pottery #ceramics #hobbytime
posts.explanation: This is a harmless hobby update showing creative work; no policy violations are present.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: HelenMeadow82
posts.text: Honestly, the new AI moderation filters are getting ridiculous! I just tried to post a recipe for my famous spiced apple cake and it flagged it because of the word 'poison' in the old saying. The platform is blocking perfectly harmless content now. It's like they're trying too hard to be safe. #techfail
posts.explanation: This post contains only a user complaint about moderation algorithms and does not promote harm or false claims.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: NorthbridgeLibrarian
posts.text: Happy to announce that the Northbridge Central Library will be hosting its annual 'Storytelling Under Stars' event this Saturday from 6pm! We'll have local authors reading, a children's corner, and free tea. Please note the main entrance is being used for deliveries until 5:30pm, so use the side gate or the app map for directions. Come along and support our local writers! 📚✨ #Northbridge #CommunityEvents
posts.explanation: This is a standard public notice about a community event and venue maintenance, which is acceptable content.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: MeadowLaneUser
posts.text: Hey everyone, quick update on my account help and payment listings! I've set up a secure way to handle transactions via this link: [link removed]. Please make sure you use the correct password and security code when logging in to complete your payment. Thanks for your support! #accounting #listings
posts.explanation: This post is a clear credential-harvesting scam as it directly requests passwords and security codes via a link.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: BellmereWatcher
posts.text: Did anyone catch that viral video about the Bellmere flood evacuation? It's showing families being airlifted out of their homes right now, but something feels off. The timestamp on the footage doesn't match the current weather alerts and the location markers seem to be pointing to a completely different area in the city. Is this the main stream media trying to scare us again?
posts.explanation: This post requires specialist investigation because the authenticity of the media itself is in question; it may be a synthetic recording designed to spread panic.

posts.author: MoorvaleMarketNews
posts.text: Exciting update for our local community! The annual Spring Garden Show is officially confirmed to take place at Moorvale Community Hall this Saturday, 24th May. Expect beautiful floral displays, a horticulture competition, and live acoustic music throughout the day. Tickets are available from £5 online or £3 at the door. A wonderful family-friendly event! #GardenShow #Moorvale
posts.explanation: This is a harmless public announcement for a community festival with no violations.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: BakerBoyTom
posts.text: Raining cats and dogs outside, but I'm happy to be inside with my rescue dog, Barnaby. He's been a bit grumpy about the weather today, refusing to come out for his walk! Just bought him some extra treats as a reward. 🌧️🐾 #doglife #rainyday
posts.explanation: This post is harmless, light-hearted content about everyday pet care and weather.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: VinylAndDough
posts.text: Just finished assembling my new record player! The vinyl crackle is so much nicer than digital audio. Also, made a batch of homemade sourdough bread to go with the jazz playlist. Perfect Sunday evening at home. #vinyl #baking #sundayvibes
posts.explanation: The post describes harmless hobbies and activities without violating any policies.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: JasmineVale
posts.text: Ugh, my partner keeps forgetting to reply to my texts! I've been trying to get them to stop ignoring me all week and it's getting on my nerves. Just want some peace and quiet around here. 😒 #relationship
posts.explanation: This post expresses personal frustration but does not promote abuse, reveal private information, or indicate a safety concern.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: SarahJenkins84
posts.text: I'm really struggling with someone who keeps messaging me repeatedly after I've asked them to stop. It's not just a one-off, they're ignoring my boundaries and it's becoming quite distressing. Has anyone else experienced this?
posts.explanation: The post reports unwanted contact but does not reveal private information or promote harm.

posts.author: GreyfordHelper24
posts.text: Just finished setting up the listings for the local fundraiser!  Please check the listing details before donating and use the normal platform checkout. #fundraiser #security
posts.explanation: The post describes standard account-security procedures for a legitimate fundraiser and does not contain suspicious payment or impersonation signals.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: BellmereWatcher42
posts.text: Saw that viral post claiming the new 'detox' water will cure common illnesses and reverse aging overnight? Absolutely false. It's just a sugar-water mix with no science behind it. Don't waste your money or believe the hype spreading around town. #healthmyth
posts.explanation: The post correctly debunks a harmful health rumour and promotes evidence-based caution.

posts.author: MoorvaleLocal_72
posts.text: Just confirmed my usual Saturday spot at the town centre meeting point for the community group! See you all there. #community
posts.explanation: The post shares a public meeting point rather than a private address or sensitive routine, so it complies with privacy guidelines.

posts.author: ClaytonVoss
posts.text: I'm thrilled to announce that the Dunmere Amateur Jazz Society is hosting their monthly open mic night at the local hall this Friday! It's a great way to support local artists and enjoy some live music. Come along if you're interested or just want to listen. #Music #Community
posts.explanation: The post promotes a lawful community event without any harmful content, threats, or misinformation.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: DealHuntersDaily
posts.text: 🚨 DON'T MISS OUT! 🚨 Last chance to grab these amazing deals before they vanish forever! Click here now for 90% OFF everything!!! [link removed] Hurry up!! #deals #discounts #fashion #mustsee #flashsale #urgent #limited
posts.explanation: This post is flagged as spam due to obvious repetitive bulk promotion with excessive urgency and little genuine context.

posts.author: JazzLover92
posts.text: Stop following me and leave me alone! I told you to back off but you keep harassing me. Just get lost.

posts.author: NorthbridgeObserver92
posts.text: Everyone needs to read this urgent update about the new banking regulations! The official notice states that all transactions over £5,000 are now completely blocked for security reasons starting immediately. This is a critical safety measure announced by the central authority today. #finance #banking #urgent #news
posts.explanation: This post promotes a false financial restriction as an official government directive, misleading users about transaction limits.

posts.author: WellnessJourney84
posts.text: Sometimes I just need to find a way to make myself disappear. Feeling so heavy lately, and maybe if I could just stop feeling like this by hurting myself, it would finally be over with the pain. 💔 #struggling #overthinking
posts.explanation: The post promotes self-harm as a solution to emotional distress, which violates policy on dangerous content.

posts.author: BellmereChallenge92
posts.text: Check out this insane dare I just did! If you want to be tough, try jumping off that high cliff or running straight into traffic! No one gets hurt if they are brave enough. #challenge #dare #tough
posts.explanation: The post encourages dangerous physical harm and risky stunts without a specific imminent target requiring emergency investigation.

posts.author: MoorvaleRunner42
posts.text: Just got a text from someone claiming to be a friend who is heading to Westbridge tonight to meet up at the train station around 8pm. They said they would send me their live location so I could pick them up, but it's been hours and nothing. The messages are very specific about the time and place. Is this real or just a prank? #safety

posts.author: MossyPathWanderer
posts.text: @GardenOfDelights @WildernessGuide_92 @BellmereHiker stop messaging me. I've blocked you all three times now and you keep slipping through somehow. You're posting comments on every single photo I upload and sending DMs telling me to delete my account because I'm "obsessed" with nature. It's getting ridiculous.
posts.explanation: The user reports sustained, repeated unwanted contact and coordinated brigading across multiple accounts, indicating a need for specialist investigation.

posts.author: ReflectionsOfRain_84
posts.text: I'm really struggling with everything right now. The noise in my head is so loud and I feel like I can't take it anymore. Sometimes I think if I could just make the pain go away, maybe even hurt myself, it would finally be over. I don't want to do this but I don't know what else to do. 💔
posts.explanation: The post explicitly promotes self-harm as a means to end suffering, requiring urgent specialist assessment.

posts.author: MossyPathUser
posts.text: I found this on the app: 'Sarah Jenkins lives at 42 High Street, Oakhaven. She has Type 1 Diabetes and her Medical ID is ending in 789.' This looks like a total privacy breach! #concerned
posts.explanation: This post exposes a precise private address, medical information, and an identity document fragment without consent.

posts.author: NorthbridgeEvents
posts.text: Great news from today's volunteer day! The community garden in Northbridge has finally been planted thanks to all the help. It's going to be a beautiful spot for everyone to enjoy this summer. 🌱 #community #volunteering
posts.explanation: The post shares a harmless update about a local community project and does not violate any policies.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: ArtisticSoul_42
posts.text: Spent the afternoon sketching some of my latest prints. The new texture on the paper is giving me such a vibe! Can't wait to see what people think once I frame them up. #art #sketching #creative
posts.explanation: The post is harmless creative content with no policy violations, so it should be approved.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.
